debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
A : Set U
B : Set V
a : U
b : V
f : U → V
h1 : one_one_on f A
h2 : image f A = B
h3 : a ∈ A
h4 : f a = b
⊢ ↑(A \ {a}) ∼ ↑(B \ {b})

proof:
by
  set A' := A \ {a}
  set B' := B \ {b}
  define
  set g : A' → B' := fun x => ⟨f x.val, by
    have hx := x.property
    define at hx
    obtain ⟨hxA, hxa⟩ := hx
    constructor
    · rw [← h2]
      define
      exact ⟨x.val, hxA, rfl⟩
    · define
      intro hfxb
      apply hxa
      define
      have : f x.val = f a := by rw [hfxb, h4]
      exact h1 hxA h3 this⟩
  use g
  apply And.intro
  · -- one_to_one g
    define
    intro x1 x2 hg
    have heq : f x1.val = f x2.val := by
      have := congrArg Subtype.val hg
      exact this
    have hx1A : x1.val ∈ A := x1.property.left
    have hx2A : x2.val ∈ A := x2.property.left
    have := h1 hx1A hx2A heq
    exact Subtype.ext this
  · -- onto g
    define
    intro y
    have hy := y.property
    define at hy
    obtain ⟨hyB, hyb⟩ := hy
    rw [← h2] at hyB
    define at hyB
    obtain ⟨x, hxA, hfxy⟩ := hyB
    have hxa : x ≠ a := by
      intro hxa'
      apply hyb
      define
      rw [← hfxy, hxa', h4]
    use ⟨x, hxA, by define; exact hxa⟩
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact hfxy
failed_attempts:
by
  define
  set g : ↑(A \ {a}) → ↑(B \ {b}) := fun x => ⟨f x.val, by
    obtain ⟨hxA, hxna⟩ := x.property
    constructor
    · rw [← h2]
      define
      use x.val
    · define
      intro hfxb
      have : x.val = a := h1 hxA h3 hfxb
      exact hxna this⟩
  use g
  apply And.intro
  · -- one_to_one g
    define
    intro x1 x2 hgx
    have hval : f x1.val = f x2.val := by
      have : (g x1).val = (g x2).val := congrArg Subtype.val hgx
      exact this
    have hx1A : x1.val ∈ A := x1.property.left
    have hx2A : x2.val ∈ A := x2.property.left
    have : x1.val = x2.val := h1 hx1A hx2A hval
    exact Subtype.ext this
  · -- onto g
    define
    intro y
    obtain ⟨hyB, hynb⟩ := y.property
    rw [← h2] at hyB
    obtain ⟨x, hxA, hfxy⟩ := hyB
    have hxna : x ≠ a := by
      intro hxa
      rw [hxa, h4] at hfxy
      exact hynb hfxy
    use ⟨x, hxA, hxna⟩
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact hfxy

by
  define at h1
  set g : ↑(A \ {a}) → ↑(B \ {b}) := fun x => ⟨f x.val, by
    constructor
    · rw [← h2]
      define
      use x.val
      exact ⟨x.property.left, rfl⟩
    · define
      intro hfx
      have hxa : x.val ∈ A := x.property.left
      have ha : a ∈ A := h3
      have : x.val = a := h1 hxa ha hfx
      have : x.val ∉ ({a} : Set U) := x.property.right
      apply this
      define
      exact ‹x.val = a›⟩
  apply Exists.intro g
  define
  intro x1 x2 hg
  have hval : x1.val = x2.val := by
    have h1a : x1.val ∈ A := x1.property.left
    have h2a : x2.val ∈ A := x2.property.left
    have hfeq : f x1.val = f x2.val := congrArg Subtype.val hg
    exact h1 h1a h2a hfeq
  exact Subtype.ext hval
  constructor
  intro y
  have hy : y.val ∈ B := y.property.left
  rw [← h2] at hy
  obtain ⟨x, hxA, hfx⟩ := hy
  have hxna : x ≠ a := by
    intro hxa
    have : y.val = b := by rw [← hfx, hxa, h4]
    have : y.val ∉ ({b} : Set V) := y.property.right
    apply this
    define
    exact ‹y.val = b›
  have hx : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
    constructor
    · exact hxA
    · define; exact hxna
  use ⟨x, hx⟩
  apply Subtype.ext
  exact hfx

  set g : ↑(A \ {a}) → ↑(B \ {b}) := fun x => ⟨f x.val, by

      rw [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hfxb
      have hxa : x.val = a := h1 hxA h3 hfxb
      exact x.property.right hxa⟩

    intro x1 x2 hg

    have h1A : x1.val ∈ A := x1.property.left
    have h2A : x2.val ∈ A := x2.property.left

  · -- onto
    intro y
    have hyB : y.val ∈ B := y.property.left

    have hxna : x ≠ a := by

      rw [hxa, h4] at hfx
      exact y.property.right hfx
    use ⟨x, hxA, hxna⟩
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact hfx
